The '''Skakoan Legal Deputies''', also known as '''Skakoan Commandos''', were elite [[Skakoan/Legends|Skakoans]] who served as members of [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor's]] staff. Two members [[Mission to Delrian|rescued]] Wat Tambor from a detainment center on [[Delrian/Legends|Delrian]] by decompressing their pressure suits and incapacitating the [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of eight [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] assigned to escort Tambor.

{{Military-stub}}
